ddls:
CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the individual (Males, Females) */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the individual (e.g., 00-04, 05-12) */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the individual (e.g., White, Black, Hispanic) */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of cases for the demographic group */,
  "geography" TEXT /* Geographical location (e.g., city, state, country) */,
  "income_bracket" TEXT /* Income bracket of the individual */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education completed */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the individual */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the individual */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sex" (
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sex */,
  "sex_name" TEXT /* Name of the sex (e.g., Males, Females) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group (e.g., 00-04, 05-12) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ethnicities" (
  "ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ethnicity */,
  "ethnicity_name" TEXT /* Name of the ethnicity (e.g., White, Black, Hispanic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ethnicity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case */,
  "case_name" TEXT /* Name of the case */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the case */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the case */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the case */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the case (e.g., active, closed) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the case */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_demographics" (
  "case_demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case demographic */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case */,
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sex */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the age group */,
  "ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ethnicity */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of cases for the demographic group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_demographics_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_demographics_sex_id FOREIGN KEY ("sex_id") REFERENCES sex ("sex_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_demographics_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_demographics_ethnicity_id FOREIGN KEY ("ethnicity_id") REFERENCES ethnicities ("ethnicity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "data_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., survey, administrative, sensor) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the data source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_data" (
  "case_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case data */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "data_value" REAL /* Value of the data */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of the data (e.g., numerical, categorical) */,
  "data_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for numerical data */,
  "data_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_data_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for the access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (e.g., predictive modeling, clustering) */,
  "analysis_result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_tool" TEXT /* Tool or method used for the analysis */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who performed the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
